calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:40am
Judge Pro tem Sharon O'Grady,not reported, clerk J. Kong, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Dorothy Sweet appears in pro per. Respondent, Marcus Newbury owner of 21st Century Home Improvement appears in pro per. Parties previously sworn. Both Parties informed Judge O'Grady that they have settled the matter before the Court hearing and appellant, Dorothy Sweet responds to questions from Judge O'Grady that she agreed to the settlement with respondent.

9:45am
matter is submitted.
